<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of sebastian/diff. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\Diff; interface LongestCommonSubsequenceCalculator { /** * Calculates the longest common subsequence of two arrays. */ public function calculate(array $from, array $to): array; }
